title: [kimi-review] d501b7a: [SEVERITY: high] Commit claims to fix a security issue (zero
description:
Commit: d501b7a25
Message: fix(oscore): zeroize EdhocInitiator/Responder signing key

Finding: [SEVERITY: high] Commit claims to fix a security issue (zeroizing EdDSA signing keys in EdhocInitiator/Responder) but contains no code changes. If merged as-is, the sensitive-key-zeroization bug remains unfixed while the commit history falsely suggests it was addressed. Verify whether the diff was truncated before review, or whether the commit is genuinely empty.
